title: Rachis Viewer Settings
description: Settings for the Rachis MIME renderer.

iframeOrigin.title: iframe origin
iframeOrigin.description: Origin to use for the embedded Rachis viewer iframe (should include protocol): https://example.com

iframePath.title: iframe path
iframePath.description: Path to use for the embedded Rachis viewer iframe, for example `/` or `/embed/`.
